hero.headline: Hey, I'm Antonio. I build tech that thinks, teaches, and wows.
hero.subheadline: Licensed Educator turned Full-Stack Developer. I craft AI-powered solutions, robust web apps, and digital experiences with a deep understanding of user pedagogy.

home.cpeDesc: An AI-powered platform generating tailored CEFR-aligned practice exams (A1-C2) using Groq and Gemini models.
home.cartaDesc: Session-based digital ordering system for high-traffic restaurants.
home.cvBuilderDesc: Professional document builder that instantly tailors CVs to specific job postings.
home.knovauDesc: Comprehensive educational platforms managing curriculum, lessons, and interactive activities for classroom deployment.
home.whyMeDesc: My superpower in the tech industry is my deep understanding of user pedagogy. As a licensed teacher with a Master's from Universidad de Alcalá and an IT background, I don't just build apps; I study how users think, learn, and click. I create tech solutions that solve actual, real-world problems because I've spent years analyzing human-system interactions in the classroom and beyond.
home.lookingFor: Looking for a developer who understands both the code and the end-user? My inbox is open.
home.allRights: Antonio Tagaruma García. All rights reserved.
home.aboutDesc: I am a Licensed Educator and Full-Stack AI Developer. Having spent over 7 years teaching internationally across Asia and Europe, I bring a unique perspective to software engineering: I don't just build applications; I study how users actually learn and interact with them. Today, I use that pedagogical insight to engineer intelligent, AI-driven platforms that solve real-world problems.
home.aboutEngineerDesc: Architecting robust, scalable web applications using modern stacks (Next.js, React, FastAPI) with a focus on clean code and performance.
home.aboutEducatorDesc: Designing digital experiences with deep pedagogical insight. I build intuitive interfaces that naturally guide users and reduce cognitive load.
home.aboutInnovatorDesc: Integrating cutting-edge AI (Gemini, Groq) and RAG architecture to automate workflows and create personalized, intelligent solutions.
home.resumeDesc: Access my complete curriculum vitae for a comprehensive breakdown of my professional experience spanning international EdTech roles, an advanced academic background, and a modern full-stack technology stack. Discover my unique journey transitioning from active classroom teaching across Asia and Europe to engineering high-performance, AI-powered digital products. Review my official educational credentials, including my Master's in Education and Licensed Professional Teacher status, alongside my technical proficiencies in Next.js, Python, and generative AI integrations. Download the full document to explore how I bridge the gap between human learning and cutting-edge software development.
home.contactDesc: I'm currently looking for new opportunities. Whether you have a question about my EdTech projects, want to discuss a role, or just want to say hi, my inbox is always open!

archive.title: Project Archive
archive.subtitle: A complete list of things I've built, hacked together, or experimented with.

about.story1: I didn't stop being a teacher when I started writing code. As an educator teaching English as a Second Language across
about.story1End: , I constantly found myself hitting the limits of the software available to me.
about.story2: So, I started building my own solutions.
about.story3: What began as simple HTML/JS browser games to keep students engaged evolved into full-fledged learning management systems (like Knovau and ESOSLPv2) built with Python and Flask. The more I built, the more I realized I didn't have to choose between education and engineering—they amplify each other.
about.story4: Today, I'm a Full-Stack Developer and Educator based in
about.story4End: , specializing in TypeScript, Next.js, Python, and scalable architecture. I build products with a unique perspective:
about.story4Strong: I know how to design for the end-user because I've spent years observing how people actually learn and interact with information.
about.cta: See how I apply this to my projects

work.letsTalk: Let's talk about your next project.
